metadata.name: Handle Request for Co-op Advertising Funds

description: A retailer requests co-op advertising funds to help promote the wholesaler's products in a local flyer, as per their agreement.

nodes.task_description: Receive the request for co-op funds from the retailer, including a proof of the ad.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the request and the ad proof.

nodes.task_description: Verify the retailer is eligible for co-op funds and that the ad meets brand guidelines.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the retailer is eligible and the ad is compliant.

nodes.task_description: Approve the request and issue a credit to the retailer's account for the agreed-upon co-op amount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the co-op advertising credit.
